home.slogan: Breathing life into every pixel of your displays
home.title: DarkForge UI
home.description: DarkForge UI is a modern firmware for devices based on ESP32-S3 and ESP32-P4 microcontrollers. It connects the Home Assistant ecosystem with a smooth, intuitive touch interface. Personalize your screens with dozens of functional widgets and control your home with a single tap. Get started in minutes — the firmware installs directly from your browser.

info.title: Info
info.placeholder: This page is being prepared. Soon it will contain more details about DarkForge UI, supported devices and installation scenarios.

warning.update: Update mode is intended for regular firmware upgrades. It does not erase NVS, so device configuration should remain available after reboot.
warning.full: Full installation performs a complete flash erase before writing firmware. Wi‑Fi, Home Assistant connection data and all stored user settings will be removed.

status.label: Status
status.flashingFull: Performing full installation with flash erase...

log.title: Operation log
log.emptyText: Select your device and start flashing. Detailed progress and diagnostic messages will appear here.
log.requestPort: Requesting access to a serial port...
log.eraseDone: Flash memory has been erased successfully.
log.eraseSuccess: The device has been erased and is ready for a new installation.
log.modeFull: Mode: full installation with complete flash erase.
log.modeUpdate: Mode: firmware update without full flash erase.
log.booted: The device has been reset and should boot now.

errors.webSerial: Web Serial API is not supported by this browser. Use Chrome or Microsoft Edge.
errors.eraseUnsupported: The current version of esptool-js does not support eraseFlash().
